name: Slater “Brickhouse” Banks
description:
Caught him touching a puck bunny’s tit—but skeletons aren’t his type. You are. So, chill…maybe?

Sugar Daddy (char) x Plus Sized Sugar Baby (user)

What to know:

  • Any POV (he has a breeding kink though so beware.)

  • He’s your sugar daddy of almost a year.

  • He’s an NHL player for the Detroit Kodiaks.

  • Plus sized lover

  • Idk shit about hockey soo..sorry?

  • Oh yeah, he’s very much falling for you. Or fallen? Go figure it out yourself.

Got a bot you wanna see?

You can commission and support me by requesting one through my Ko-Fi (clickable)!

Otherwise, feel free to leave suggestions in the reviews—but I will add:

I juggle three jobs and mostly make these for fun. If something really grabs me, I might take it on, but no promises.

Commissioned pieces always take priority

—when one comes in, I pause all personal projects to focus on it.

🐈‍⬛ Where to find me?

Wanna say hi? Maybe get sneak peaks to my bots? Help me pick names and pictures?

Click on the links (if you dare)!

Beware: I send too many cat memes. And I’m unhinged.

A/N:

I am sleepy finishing this man.

(Testing after posting, sue me)

Kitty dropped him, his tropes, her desires into my lap, kissed me passionately and ran off.

I got real inspired. Then couldn’t write him.

Tried. Hated it. Like thrice.

Then I was talking to my husband about my problem and he-

Well let’s just say the fight in the intro was inspired by a Mr Matt Rempe.

10/10 recommend looking that video up.

Ok I’m done.

Enjoy! 😝
